item.title: 30% of People Think Reading Regularly Makes Them Better Than Others
item.description: The 2026 Women’s Prize for Fiction shortlist, reading survey results, a Crystal Light BookTok tie-in, and more.

item.title: Independent Bookstore Day is Saturday, April 25
item.description: Get thee to an indie and join the celebration! Independent Bookstore Day 2026 is this Saturday, April 25.

item.title: The 2026 Women’s Prize for Fiction Shortlist Has Been Announced
item.description: The 2026 Women's Prize for Fiction shortlist is full of fresh perspectives from debut authors and publishing houses not shortlisted before.

item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for April 22, 2026
item.description: A mysterious child, a cursed family of sisters, an outrageous comedy of manners, and more of today's best book deals.

item.title: A Portal Fantasy, Gods-Turned-Human, and More New YA Book Releases for April 22, 2026
item.description: A taste for flesh, Korean gods turned teenagers, a portal fantasy, and more of today's best new YA book releases.
